changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Add staleness tracking columns to channel table

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_channel_is_stale ON channel (is_stale) WHERE is_stale = true; CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_channel_last_event_at ON channel (last_event_at);

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Create trigger function to update channel last_event_at on event insert
